parameters.text:
=✅ *SENTINEL Pipeline Complete*
• Run: `{{ $json.run_id.substring(0,8) }}`
• 30d Revenue Forecast: *R$ {{ Number($json.revenue_30d).toLocaleString('en-IN') }}*
• Top Segment: *{{ $json.top_segment }}*
• Forecast Accuracy: *{{ $json.forecast_accuracy }}*
• Segments: {{ $json.num_segments }} | Anomalies: {{ $json.anomaly_count }}
• 📄 Report: http://localhost:3000/run/{{ $json.run_id }}

parameters.query: UPDATE runs SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), kpi_summary = '{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}'::jsonb WHERE run_id = '{{ $json.run_id }}';
